Title: Manage hiring pipeline

As a recruiter
I want to manage candidates, stages, offers, interviews, and notes
So that the hiring pipeline stays actionable

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] HrHiring renders candidate records from Supabase.
- [ ] Users can add or edit candidate details.
- [ ] Candidate stages/statuses can be changed through forms or flows.
- [ ] Interview log and candidate edit modals close on Escape.

Notes: Detailed behavior spans HrHiring, EditCandidateModal, InterviewLogModal, and flow files.
